features.name: Brand
features.description: Car manufacturer. Included as a categorical model feature.

features.name: Model
features.description: Car model. Included as a categorical model feature.

passthrough_fields.name: car_id
passthrough_fields.description: Application car identifier. Not used by the model, returned with recommendations for UI navigation.

passthrough_fields.name: listing_id
passthrough_fields.description: Application listing identifier. Not used by the model, returned with recommendations for inquiries.

passthrough_fields.name: listing_status
passthrough_fields.description: Listing status supplied by the backend. Recommendation endpoints should receive active listings only.

passthrough_fields.name: listing_description
passthrough_fields.description: Optional listing text displayed by the UI. Not used by the model.

passthrough_fields.name: image_url
passthrough_fields.description: Optional application image URL. Not used by the model.
